title: Limit function cognitive complexity
description: Functions with high cognitive complexity are difficult to understand, test, and maintain. Cognitive complexity measures how hard it is for humans to understand the control flow, considering nested conditions, loops, and other complexity factors.
recommendation: Break down complex functions into smaller, simpler functions with clear single responsibilities.

noncompliant.description: Deeply nested conditions create high cognitive complexity that is hard to understand and maintain.

compliant.description: Break complex logic into smaller, focused functions with clear responsibilities.
